title: Roblox Expected to Beat Earnings Estimates: What to Know Ahead of Q3 Release
text: Analysts expected Roblox to post a quarterly loss of $0.38 per share for Q3 2024, which represented a year-over-year change of +15.6%. Revenues were expected to be $1.02 billion, up 21.9% from the year-ago quarter. Roblox announced better-than-expected revenue in Q3 2024, with sales up 28.8% year on year to $919 million. Bookings reached $1.13 billion versus analyst estimates of $1.02 billion, representing a 10.8% beat. Revenue came in at $919 million versus analyst estimates of $884.1 million, a 3.9% beat. EPS posted negative $0.37 versus analyst estimates of negative $0.38, a 3.2% beat. However, next quarter's revenue guidance of $947.5 million was less impressive, coming in 2.1% below analysts' estimates. The company demonstrated its ability to execute on user growth and engagement metrics, with strong international expansion continuing to drive results.
